race.comment: PETA'S HEART (7) saved plenty of ground back on the fence and booted through to make a complete mess of them over this trip at headquarters two weeks ago in the slop. Similar conditions here and gets in light with the rise in grade. Can make it two on the bounce. FLASH ALICE (6) snatched victory two back here then chased in vain behind Peta's last time. Meets her with a handy little swing at the weights and if she can land closer from the inside draw, she could easily reverse the result. LONGER ROUTE (5) also comes through that race and is going better than his form reads. Should be nearing a peak now and that would be good enough to be right there at the pointy end. BUDJIK BOY (4) was much better here third-up when beaten less than a length. Has more to offer fourth-up as he stretches to a winning trip. Bold showing is anticipated. MARACOURT (1) is a frustrating galloper but has peaks that measure up. Have to keep him safe on a track he loves.
